business.headline: Explained: Why BHEL share price jumped 10% to hit upper circuit todayBHEL stock: BHEL shares hit the 10% upper circuit after the company reported a sharp March quarter earnings beat. The rally was driven by stronger profit, better margins, solid revenue growth and a dividend recommendation.
8th Pay Commission update: Where things stand after 6 monthsSix months after its formation, the 8th Pay Commission is moving steadily, but how far has it really progressed so far? Let's have a look.

Sensex, Nifty get thumbs up as BJP leads in Bengal, markets gainThe BSE Sensex was up 334.71 points, or 0.44%, at 77,248.21 as of 12:44 pm, while the Nifty 50 gained 103.90 points, or 0.43%, to trade at 24,101.45 as of 12:30 PM.

Are election results behind today's fall in gold prices?Gold prices slipped on Monday, and one big question is on everyone's mind, i.e., are election results the reason behind the dip, or is there more at play in the market?

Why India's smaller cities are the next premium real estate goldmineTier II and III cities are emerging as the next hub for premium real estate growth, driven by infrastructure spending and stronger connectivity. The shift points to a long-term move towards high-value housing beyond metros as incomes and aspirations rise.

How this woman built a Rs 1 crore net worth by 28 before her weddingJust days before stepping into a new phase of life, a 28-year-old woman hit a goal many spend decades chasing—a Rs 1 crore net worth. And she did it without complex strategies or expert help.

Sensex jumps 700 points: Why is stock market rising today?The BSE Sensex jumped 896.70 points, or 1.17%, to 77,810.20 as of 9:50 am, while the Nifty 50 rose 262.70 points, or 1.09%, to 24,260.25 as of 9:50 am.
Sensex, Nifty jump over easing crude oil prices; Maruti leads gainsThe S&P BSE Sensex was up 778.78 points to 77,692.28, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 223.80 points to 24,221.35 as of 9:35 am.

OnEMI Technology IPO struggles with low demand, weak GMP: Why it's high-risk betOnEMI Technology Solutions' IPO opened to soft demand, with weak retail participation and a muted GMP. The response underlines investor caution around credit risk, partner dependence and the company's ongoing transition.

Who is Rohit Jain, the new RBI deputy governor?The government has appointed Rohit Jain as an RBI deputy governor for a three-year term from May 2026. The move brings a longtime insider with banking supervision experience into a key role as portfolios are set to be reshuffled.

Thermos recalls 8.2 million containers after stoppers caused vision lossThermos has recalled 8.2 million food jars and bottles after stoppers unexpectedly ejected and injured users. The defect has been linked to pressure build-up, with 27 incidents reported and three cases of permanent vision loss.

Amid Hormuz closure, OPEC+ raises oil output quotas, no mention of UAE withdrawalSeven OPEC+ countries will raise oil output targets by 188,000 barrels per day in June, the third consecutive monthly increase, OPEC+ said in a statement after an online meeting. The increase is the same as that agreed for May minus the share of the United Arab Emirates, which left the group on May 1.
AI is helping you invest. But should you trust it?From picking stocks to timing trades, AI is becoming your new investment guide. The real question is, should you trust it with your money?

Mandatory but delayed: Why third-party motor insurance claims take years to settleHandcrafted ByOur Editors In the fourth story in our series Motor Mess, which looks at issues in motor insurance, we spoke to industry experts to understand why claims take years to settle.

Air India to cut international flights till July amid fuel surge, airspace curbsAir India will cut international flights from June to July as rising ATF prices, airspace restrictions, and longer routes make several operations unprofitable, CEO Campbell Wilson said.

How best to tackle oil shock? Dr Sajjid Z Chinoy respondsIn an interview with India Today, Dr Sajjid Z Chinoy, Chief India Economist at JP Morgan, discussed the global energy shock and its impact on the Indian economy following the recent hikes in commercial LPG and anticipated domestic fuel price increases.

Not complying with trade deal: Trump hikes tariffs on cars, trucks from EU to 25%The move comes months after Trump and European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen agreed to a new trade deal in July 2025, which set a 15 per cent tariff on most goods, including automobiles and auto parts.

Petrol, diesel prices may be hiked by Rs 4-5 per litre, LPG by Rs 40-50: SourcesPetrol and diesel prices may increase by Rs four to five per litre, while domestic LPG cylinder prices could rise by Rs 40-50 per cylinder, according to government sources.

Fuel, LPG prices may go up, decision likely within 5-7 days: Government sourcesPetrol, diesel prices may rise by Rs 4–5 per litre and LPG by Rs 40–50 per cylinder, following a sharp jump in global crude oil prices driven by West Asia war.

Will your minimum pension rise from Rs 1,000 to Rs 7,500? Find out who benefitsPensioners across the country may soon see a shift in their monthly income if the proposed changes go through. Here's what we know so far and who could benefit.

entertainment.headline: Are Janhvi and Shikhar getting married? Boney Kapoor sets the record straight Reports have surfaced that Janhvi Kapoor and Shikhar Pahariya are set to get married. The couple, who began dating early in life, reportedly broke up in 2016 before reconciling in 2022.

Nani, Venkat Prabhu, celebs congratulate Vijay as TVK nears majority in debut poll Film personalities congratulated Vijay after early counting trends showed TVK leading in Tamil Nadu. The reactions gathered pace as his debut election performance pushed the party close to a majority.

Uttapam on MasterChef Australia: Contestant's tribute to home wins hearts Indian-origin contestant Kanika Gadyok served uttapam with chutneys and sambar on MasterChef Australia. Her quick batter innovation and tribute turned a simple dish into a standout moment.

Babil Khan returns to shoot after mental health break, shares gratitude note Babil Khan has returned to film sets after taking a break to focus on his mental health and personal well-being. The actor resumed shooting for his upcoming project and also shared a heartfelt message expressing gratitude to his fans.

Ranveer Allahbadia announces Latent documentary: Want to bury this controversy Ranveer Allahbadia has announced a documentary on the India's Got Latent controversy after reuniting with Samay Raina on The Great Indian Kapil Show. He said it will chronicle the row day by day as he seeks to close the episode and move ahead.

Birthday girl Trisha visits Vijay as TVK debut stuns Tamil Nadu giants Trisha was seen outside TVK chief Vijay's Chennai home as early counting trends came in. Her visit drew attention while the party led in 109 seats and topped vote share in Tamil Nadu.

Actor Mukesh Khanna open to marriage at 67: Wife is written in destiny At 67, actor Mukesh Khanna said he still believes in marriage and is open to the idea if destiny allows. He called marriage a karmic bond.

Salman Khan mourns 'brother' Sushil Kumar in moving post: No tears, only memories Salman Khan paid an emotional Instagram tribute after the death of his close friend Sushil Kumar. His posts blended grief, humour and memories of a friendship that lasted 42 years.

Khalistani aa gaye oye: Diljit Dosanjh says he's targeted in both India and abroad Diljit Dosanjh used his Edmonton concert to speak about the criticism he faces in India and abroad. The 'Khalistani aa gaye oye' remark came days after protests at his Calgary show and underscored the political push and pull around him.

Divya Dutta: SRK's wow factor lies in his thoughtful and sensitive nature Divya Dutta spoke about Shah Rukh Khan's off-screen personality, calling his thoughtful and sensitive nature his true "wow factor." She also recalled memories that highlight his kindness and ability to connect with people.

Saira Banu meets Hema Malini, recalls Dharmendra and Dilip Kumar's bond. See post Saira Banu shared a heartfelt Instagram note after meeting Hema Malini. The post revisited their first meeting in 1966 and a friendship she said the two had nurtured.

Dacoit OTT release: When and where to watch Adivi Sesh, Mrunal Thakur's film The wait for Adivi Sesh and Mrunal Thakur's film Dacoit to land on an OTT platform is almost over. Reports suggest the film, which was released in theatres on April 10, will premiere online on May 8.

Patriot box office Day 3: Rs 63 crore global haul despite India slowdown Patriot opened well on Friday but lost pace in India over the weekend as overseas markets stayed strong. Its Rs 63.61 crore worldwide start was driven largely by diaspora turnout, pushing the film past Rs 50 crore in three days.

Fans touch Riteish Deshmukh's feet during surprise Raja Shivaji screening visit Riteish Deshmukh made a surprise visit to a Mumbai screening of Raja Shivaji, where fans touched his feet. The emotional scenes added to the film's buzz as audiences cheered his portrayal of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.

Naagin 7 goof-up goes viral, fans slam makers over VFX mistake A blue screen was left visible in a key Naagin 7 scene streamed on JioHotstar. The editing mistake sparked online criticism and revived complaints about the show's VFX before the June 7 finale.

What Javed Akhtar said about propaganda films after admitting love for Dhurandhar 2 Javed Akhtar said films should be free to promote ideas, as he addressed criticism around Dhurandhar. His remarks added to the wider debate over whether popular narratives are being branded propaganda.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 46: Now No. 2 Indian film worldwide, Baahubali 2 falls Aditya Dhar's Dhurandhar: The Revenge has overtaken Baahubali 2 worldwide after 46 days in theatres. The milestone makes it the second highest-grossing Indian film globally, behind only Dangal.

Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal make first public outing after son Vihaan's birth Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal were clicked together at Mumbai airport after their son Vihaan's birth. The outing drew attention as their first public appearance as parents.

Raja Shivaji box office Day 3: Riteish's film stays strong over opening weekend Raja Shivaji grossed Rs 40.34 crore in India over its opening weekend and remained steady on Sunday, Day 3. The Marathi version led the collections, while the Hindi version also contributed to the film's overall momentum.

general news.headline: TMC's Bhaipo dares Union of India to come to Falta. BJP storms entire BengalDays after Trinamool Congress leader and Mamata Banerjee's nephew Abhishek Banerjee challenged the "Union of India" to come and contest from Falta in Diamond Harbour, the BJP seems to have stormed West Bengal. The BJP is leading in around 188 seats, with Falta to see fresh polling on May 21.

Live: Vijay ahead in Perambur, Trichy amid TVK's strong show; party's big offer to CongressTamil Nadu Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: In an evolving historic shift in Tamil Nadu's political landscape, actor-turned-politician Vijay's TVK is looking poised to win the Assembly elections on its own by achieving simple majority of 118 seats as the trends suggested. While party chief Vijay was leading in both Perambur and Tiruchirapalli, the TVK was closing in on the half-way mark with the AIADMK and DMK struggling to even reach a 70-seat mark. In another likely setback for Chief Minister MK Stalin, the DMK president was trailing by quite a margin in Kolathur, the lone seat he is contesting. However, Udayanidhi Stalin was leading in Chepauk. Meanwhile, Congress expressed willingness to lend support to the TVK just in case it falls short of the majority mark. Earlier, the counting of votes started at 8 am on Monday, with many rounds of counting still to go. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for the latest updates.

Vijay prediction bang on. Is PK now most-famous Bihari in Tamil Nadu after Dhoni?A year ago, poll strategist and Jan Suraaj leader Prashant Kishor joked about competing with cricket star MS Dhoni in Tamil Nadu's popularity charts. He had said he would become the most popular Bihari in Tamil Nadu after the 2026 Assembly polls. That tongue-in-cheek boast might now prove true, as he advised Vijay's party TVK, which is set to win the state polls.

Omar Abdullah's 2-word tweet captures Bengal and Tamil Nadu upsetsThe Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister posted on X as the BJP surged towards a landslide win in West Bengal, while Vijay's TVK made a striking debut in Tamil Nadu.

Where is Vijay? TVK is buzzing, but its protagonist is still unreachableAs TVK surged past 100 leads in its Assembly debut, Vijay stayed away from public view through counting day. His silence, even amid swelling celebrations, turned the result into a wider political and cinematic spectacle.

The Jhalmuri effect: BJP leads in all Jhargram seats held by TrinamoolThe BJP is ahead in all four Jhargram seats - the 'Jhalmuri' belt - and appears set for a wider breakthrough in battleground Bengal. The humble jhalmuri piqued people's interest like never before after PM Modi had a taste of it during one of his rallies in Jhargram.

Vijay can give back the power you lost: TVK chief's father pitch to CongressS A Chandrasekhar has urged the Congress to align with TVK as Assembly trends favour Vijay's party. The appeal has sharpened focus on post-poll alliances and TVK's role in Tamil Nadu's political arithmetic.

BJP in, Didi out. Saffron sweeps BengalThe BJP has wrested Bengal from Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress. The saffron side, which has longed for the eastern state for years, is nearing 200 seats in a historic victory, marking the end of the TMC's 15-year reign.

Birthday girl Trisha visits Vijay as TVK debut stuns Tamil Nadu giantsTrisha was seen outside TVK chief Vijay's Chennai home as early counting trends came in. Her visit drew attention while the party led in 109 seats and topped vote share in Tamil Nadu.

Thermos recalls 8.2 million containers after stoppers caused vision lossThermos has recalled 8.2 million food jars and bottles after stoppers unexpectedly ejected and injured users. The defect has been linked to pressure build-up, with 27 incidents reported and three cases of permanent vision loss.

Godrej Industries lays out 2031 growth ambitionsThe purpose statement, 'Crafting tomorrow since 1897', celebrates the Godrej Group's legacy while clearly positioning the new, refreshed Godrej Industries for the future.

Thalapathy Vijay to Chief Minister Vijay? TVK delivers Tamil Nadu blockbusterWhile vote counting is still underway, early trends show Vijay's TVK leading in 110 seats, while the ruling DMK is ahead in just 40. The AIADMK has retained much of its rural base and is emerging as the second-largest party, leading in 64 seats.

Video: Whistle wave in Tamil Nadu as celebrations break out in Vijay's familyEarly trends in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections triggered jubilant scenes at Vijay's residence, with his Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) taking a commanding lead. Over two hours into counting, TVK was ahead in 106 of 234 seats, placing it firmly in front, with the AIADMK-led alliance trailing at 71 and the DMK alliance at 56. A video clip showed Vijay's family, including his father, celebrating with cheers, hugs and whistles, capturing the moment of what could be a landmark political debut. Security was tightened outside his residence as supporters began gathering. The strong showing has also revived speculation around possible post-poll alignments, despite no pre-poll alliance.

Rahul Gandhi's babbar sher Gaurav Gogoi loses Jorhat to BJP MLA by 23,000 votesWith all 14 rounds of counting having been completed in Jorhat, Congress leader Gaurav Gogoi has lost the prestigious Jorhat seat in the Ahom-dominated belt. BJP's Hitendra Nath Goswami won by over 23,000 votes.

Live: BJP ends 'Mamata raj' in Bengal, breaches Kolkata and Howrah bastionsBengal Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: The BJP, which has long set its sights on Bengal, appears to be on track for a breakthrough in what could mark a major political shift in the eastern state. The party has crossed the halfway mark of 147 seats and is now leading in over 170, well ahead of the Mamata Banerjee-led Trinamool Congress, which is around the 100 mark in early trends. Most importantly, the TMC's hold over the Presidency region appears to be slipping. The last time such a shift occurred under an incumbent government in Bengal, it marked the end of the Left's over three-decade rule. If these leads hold, it would signal a historic win for the BJP and a significant setback for the TMC, which has been in power in Bengal for the past 15 years.

NDA crosses 100-mark in Assam as BJP-led alliance eyes best ever performanceEarly counting trends from Assam point to a dramatic political shift as the BJP-led NDA surges past the 100-seat mark, while opposition parties struggle to keep pace across key constituencies as results continue to unfold.

Nani, Venkat Prabhu, celebs congratulate Vijay as TVK nears majority in debut pollFilm personalities congratulated Vijay after early counting trends showed TVK leading in Tamil Nadu. The reactions gathered pace as his debut election performance pushed the party close to a majority.

Live: Congress-led UDF seals Kerala landslide, BJP wins one seatKerala Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Kerala Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: As the counting of votes progresses in Kerala, the trends show a clear mandate for the Congress-led United Democratic Front (UDF). The ruling Left Democratic Front (LDF), under the leadership of Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan, appears to be heading for a humiliating defeat, ending its bid for a third term. Voting began at 8 am, and in many seats, counting is yet to reach the midway mark. Stay tuned to India Today for real-time updates on the Kerala Assembly election results.

Live:Congress's Ramesh Pisharody extends massive lead over BJP's Shobha SurendranPalakkad Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: The Palakkad Assembly constituency has emerged as one of the most closely watched battlegrounds, witnessing a triangular contest between the Congress-led UDF's candidate, actor Ramesh Pisharody, the BJP's Shobha Surendran and CPI(M)-backed NMR Razak. Traditionally a competitive seat, the spotlight has intensified this time not only due to the BJP's strong performance but also because the constituency was represented by former Congress MLA Rahil Mamkootathil, who faces multiple sexual harassment allegations. The primary contest is between the Congress and the BJP, as vote counting began at 8 am. Stay tuned to India Today for all the latest updates from Kerala's Palakkad Assembly seat.

The seven Ms setting the tone for Bengal high-stakes poll battleBengal's 2026 election battle is being framed around five key Ms alongside Modi and Mamata. The shift marks a move from Mamata Banerjee's old 'maa, maati, manush' pitch to a broader electoral calculus.

Khalistani aa gaye oye: Diljit Dosanjh says he's targeted in both India and abroadDiljit Dosanjh used his Edmonton concert to speak about the criticism he faces in India and abroad. The 'Khalistani aa gaye oye' remark came days after protests at his Calgary show and underscored the political push and pull around him.

Blockbuster Vijay: DMK's loss is TVK's gain, show Tamil Nadu leadsEarly counting trends show Vijay's Tamilaga Vetri Kazhagam leading in 46 seats and topping vote share. The figures suggest TVK is cutting into both DMK and AIADMK support and could emerge as the state's single-largest party.

Live: Mamata Banerjee's lead shrinks in Bhabanipur as Suvendu Adhikari closes the gapBhabanipur Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Counting of votes is still underway in West Bengal, but the outcome is all but clear with the BJP set for a historic victory. In Bhabanipur, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee continues to lead, though her margin has narrowed in recent rounds. As per the latest update, Banerjee has secured 41,138 votes and is ahead by a margin of 12,131 votes after 10 rounds of counting. The contest against BJP leader Suvendu Adhikari has seen fluctuations through the day, with early swings giving way to a more stable lead. Bhabanipur, widely seen as Banerjee's political stronghold in south Kolkata, remains one of the most closely watched seats, even as the broader state trends point decisively in favour of the BJP. More clarity is expected as the remaining rounds of counting are completed.

DMK workers seen packing up at Chennai office as TVK show pushes party to 3rd spotEarly counting trends in Tamil Nadu showed the AIADMK, Vijay's TVK and the DMK locked in a close contest. The numbers hinted at TVK's emergence as a major player as the mood at the DMK headquarters turned grim.

sports.headline: RCB's Phil Salt flies back to England after injury: Will he return in IPL 2026? IPL 2026: Phil Salt has returned to England for scans on his finger injury after missing three matches for RCB. His absence has left Bengaluru reworking their top order at a crucial stage of IPL 2026.

Shedge stays grounded after Punjab Kings rescue act vs GT Suryansh Shedge struck 57 off 29 balls to lift Punjab Kings from 47 for 5 against Gujarat Titans. After the rescue act, he said his focus was on winning the trophy, not any race for places.

MI vs LSG preview: Mumbai, Lucknow fight for survival as elimination threat IPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Hardik Pandya's Mumbai Indians and Rishabh Pant's Lucknow Super Giants have their backs to the wall and will have their task cut out when they face each other on Monday at the Wankhede Stadium.

Shubman Gill continues social media banter, this time teases PBKS in Insta post IPL 2026: Shubman Gill followed Gujarat Titans' win over Punjab Kings with another teasing social media post. The post extended his pattern of post-match banter and drew fresh online reaction.

When Siraj's opening-over storm blew away PBKS top order IPL 2026: Mohammed Siraj struck twice in the opening over to derail Punjab Kings against Gujarat Titans. The burst exposed how heavily Punjab's batting depends on a fast powerplay start.

Manchester United to hand Carrick permanent role after Champions League return? Manchester United beat Liverpool 3-2 at Old Trafford to secure Champions League qualification under caretaker boss Michael Carrick. The result has sharpened the debate over whether Carrick should get the job permanently.

World Relays: India end disappointing campaign with injury and DNF India's campaign at the World Athletics Relays ended on a disappointing note, marred by injuries, disqualifications and a string of failed baton exchanges. However, the mixed 4x100m relay team broke the National Record with a strong timing of 41.35 seconds.

KKR players smash cake on Andre Russell's face after win vs SRH In perhaps the most hilarious match-winning celebration in the Indian Premier League this season, KKR's player turned coach Andre Russell had cake smashed all over his face after the team beat SunRisers Hyderabad. KKR beat 3rd placed SRH in Hyderabad on Sunday.

GT survive PBKS' last over scare, tame chase drags into tense Ahmedabad finish GT vs PBKS, IPL 2026: Gujarat Titans survived a tense final-over scare to beat Punjab Kings by four wickets in Ahmedabad, with Suryansh Shedge's rescue act and Punjab's late fight turning 163 into a gripping thriller.

Is this peak IPL? Mark Wood reveals bizarre story about team owner England pacer Mark Wood narrated a bizarre story from his IPL stint, revealing how a franchise owner once offered to fly him in on a private plane to play a match in the tournament. Can you guess what IPL team and owner this could have been?

India will get the best out of Nandni Sharma: Jemimah Rodrigues backs young pacer Jemimah Rodrigues backed young fast bowler Nandni Sharma to deliver for India in the Women's T20 World Cup later this year after she earned her maiden national call-up for the global event.

Manchester United vs Liverpool: Unconscious Alex Ferguson taken to hospitalFormer Manchester United manager Sir Alex Ferguson was taken to hospital after feeling unwell ahead of the team's Premier League clash against Liverpool on Sunday. Ferguson had fallen unconscious ahead of the game at Old Trafford.

Jannik Sinner boosts French Open hopes after historic Madrid Open title runMadrid Open: World No.1 Jannik Sinner clinched the title after defeating Alexander Zverev 6-1, 6-2 in the final in just 57 minutes. He will now aim to complete a Career Golden Masters when he competes at the Italian Open.

Who is Suryansh Shedge? Punjab Kings youngster steps-up vs GT in AhmedabadIPL 2026: Suryansh Shedge announced his arrival in the Indian Premier League with a fighting fifty for Punjab Kings against Gujarat Titans. Coming into bat with his side in crisis, Shedge's counter-attacking knock helped revive the innings in Ahmedabad.

Ramakrishna Ghosh ruled out of IPL 2026, sustains foot fracture after IPL debutIPL 2026: CSK's injury troubles worsened as Ramakrishna Ghosh was ruled out of IPL 2026 with a foot fracture, ending the uncapped all-rounder's campaign just after his debut

Shubman, getting married? Danny Morrison's question leaves GT captain irritatedIPL 2026: Shubman Gill was left visibly irritated after commentator Danny Morrison asked him a personal question at the toss ahead of Gujarat Titans' clash against Punjab Kings. Here's what happened at the toss in Ahmedabad.

Rishabh Pant bogged down by price tag? LSG bowling coach addresses batter's poor formIPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Bharat Arun said the price tag has nothing to do with Rishabh Pant's indifferent run of form. The LSG bowling coach backed the captain to bounce back despite his modest returns this season.

India must tackle doping crisis to host Olympics: International Testing AgencyIndia must urgently reform its anti-doping system to strengthen its 2036 Olympics bid, with ITA chief Benjamin Cohen warning that testing lapses and weak governance remain major concerns.

Spin twins Varun and Narine halt SRH juggernaut in Hyderabad as KKR hang onIPL 2026: Varun Chakravarthy and Sunil Narine spun SunRisers Hyderabad into submission, restricting them to 165 before Angkrish Raghuvanshi and Ajinkya Rahane completed a controlled chase. Three wins from three. KKR's unlikely revival has a heartbeat now.

GT vs PBKS Highlights: Gujarat Titans edge past Punjab Kings in last-over thrillerGT (Gujarat) vs PBKS (Punjab) Highlights, IPL 2026: Gujarat Titans beat the Punjab Kings by four wickets at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. Chasing 164, the Titans got home with one ball to spare.

PV Sindhu joins Kaavya Maran to cheer for SunRisers in HyderabadSRH vs KKR: One of India's top badminton players, PV Sindhu, attended the Indian Premier League match between SunRisers Hyderabad and Kolkata Knight Riders. Sindhu hung out with SRH owner Kaviya Maran at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium.

200 for Sunil Narine: KKR great becomes first overseas bowler to hit double tonIPL 2026: Sunil Narine became only the third bowler to go past 200 wickets in the Indian Premier League. The West Indies great took two wickets in a disciplined bowling effort from Kolkata Knight Riders in Hyderabad on Sunday, May 3.

Jemimah Rodrigues says India hungry to keep title run going with T20 World CupJemimah Rodrigues said India are hungrier than ever for a second world title, with the team targeting T20 World Cup success in England after last year's landmark ODI triumph.

Manish Pandey gets a game in IPL 2026, joins Rohit and Virat in elite listIPL 2026: Kolkata Knight Riders recalled Manish Pandey for the SunRisers Hyderabad match, replacing Ramandeep Singh. The appearance placed him alongside Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma as players to feature in all 19 IPL seasons.

IPL throwback: How Ashwin got MS Dhoni to lose his cool, earn his big break at CSKR Ashwin recalled how dismissing MS Dhoni in the Challenger Trophy and celebrating the wicket earned attention, helped him break into CSK, and began a long cricketing bond.

Mittal family and Adar Poonawalla buy Rajasthan Royals in Rs 15,660 crore dealContrary to past reports, Steel giants the Mittal family and billionaire Adar Poonawalla have acquired Rajasthan Royals for Rs 15,660 crore. The sale of the champions of the inaugural edition of the IPL comes on the heels of the record-breaking sale of Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

I was harassed by Brij Bhushan, I am one of the six victims: Vinesh PhogatOlympian Vinesh Phogat, a key face of the 2023 New Delhi protests, has identified herself as one of the six women harassed by Brij Bhushan Sharan Singh, alleging upcoming trials for Asian Games 2026 are rigged to block her comeback.

Hardik is a plastic captain: Ex-selector slams MI skipper's intent in CSK lossKris Srikkanth tore into Hardik Pandya after Mumbai Indians' outing against Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. The criticism centred on Pandya's 18 off 23 balls and CSK's method of tying him down through the middle overs.
The Vibhuti Effect: Why do India's chess prodigies swear by the sacred ash?Why India's chess prodigies carry an ancient ritual into the world's most cerebral arena, and what it's doing to their game.

Has Hardik lost MI dressing room?EX-IND batter's big claim after CSK defeatManoj Tiwary said Hardik Pandya appears to have lost the Mumbai Indians dressing room after the defeat to Chennai Super Kings. He said the side looked fundamentally unsettled, with limited backing for the captain and inconsistent performances damaging the campaign.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
